assets.notes: Starter UI pack copied from template. Panel image is used as the editor preview.

assets.source: source-first: shared library, then CC0/OFL, then generated proof
assets.notes: Illustrated hub with locked gate, gate guard, contract board, Dragon memorial/beacon, and future clickable objects.
Authored Ash Border atlas with irregular highlighted region, roads, river, Last Post, gate outskirts, Old Mill, and fogged future zones.
City-style v2 first contract location background with readable grain-storage problem and a yard composition suitable for the Black Sun clue state.

assets.source: source-first: shared library, then CC0/OFL, then generated proof
assets.notes: Simple readable scavenger/road threat suitable for pure autobattle.

assets.source: source-first: shared library, then CC0/OFL, then generated proof
assets.notes: Small clue props: black sun mark, burned chain bracket, torn order scrap.
Low-noise player seeker HUD portrait for the top character panel; also suitable as the character sheet fallback.

Smooth angled 128x128 HUD currency icon for the top resource counter, regenerated with a solid side band and clean bottom edge, then denoised/quantized to reduce gradient and edge noise while keeping the coin rim, side thickness, and crown mark readable.
